topic: My doctor's office has been calling to remind me about appointments I do not remember scheduling
title: My Doctor's Office Has Been Calling About Appointments I Do Not Remember Scheduling | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My doctor's office has been calling to remind me about appointments I never made.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen displaying a missed call voicemail from a doctor's office, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Primary care. Same doctor for nine years. Same office.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a primary care doctor's waiting room at dusk, empty chairs, a receptionist desk visible, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Annual physical. November. That is it.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a personal day planner showing one circled date in November, the rest of the calendar blank, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Voicemail in March. Reminder for a follow up appointment.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone playing a voicemail with the doctor's office number visible in the caller ID, vertical 9:16 framing
close detail of a phone call interface showing a return call in progress, the receptionist's office line on speaker, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The receptionist read me back a schedule of seven previous visits this year alone.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a paper medical schedule on a counter at a doctor's office with seven dates highlighted, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Drove to the office. Requested my chart.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a person's hand opening a medical file folder at a doctor's office front desk, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Seven visits. My signature on every check in form. Different ink. Same hand.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a check in form with the same signature on seven different sheets, the dates visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Doctor showed me notes from the visits. Symptoms I have never had.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of an exam room with a doctor seen from behind looking at a chart, no face visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last visit was three days ago. Friday morning. I was at work all day.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a printed medical chart showing notes for symptoms with dates highlighted in yellow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: They have me scheduled again next Thursday.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a calendar with a Thursday date circled in red marker, no other notation visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I want to know what I am going in for.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a person's hand on a steering wheel parked outside a medical office building, dim ambient parking lot light, vertical 9:16 framing
